title: English Voice actors for Extra Eva characters
display_title: English Voice actors for Extra Eva characters
wikitext:
[]: English Voice actors for Extra Eva characters...             Quote Post by OneShotPunch » Sat Feb 10, 2024 3:06 pm Let's say Girlfriend of Steel and/or Second Impression somehow made their way to America, even getting their own english dubs. Most likely it'd be ADV who would handle them, but let's assume Netflix's cast could also get on it. Who do you think would voice Mana Kirishima, Keita, Musashi and Mayumi Yamagishi? Add any other characters you'd like to see dubbed.

[]: Re: English Voice actors for Extra Eva characters...             Quote Post by Blockio » Sat Feb 10, 2024 4:04 pm It's actually very unlikely that the ADV cast would have any involvement; besides the fact that the company only exists as a shell corporation at this point, khara also demonstrably has grown tired of their nonsense

[]: Re: English Voice actors for Extra Eva characters...             Quote Post by OneShotPunch » Sat Feb 10, 2024 4:22 pm Maybe I could have been clearer, if those games were imported around the time they were released (1996 and 1997), ADV might have handled the dubbing for them. Either way, it's more of a hypothetical scenario than anything. A question of who'd voice who.

[]: Re: English Voice actors for Extra Eva characters...             Quote Post by Blockio » Sun Feb 11, 2024 4:29 pm Ah yes, in that case ADV most likely would have been the distributor, yes. Unfortunately, I am not particularily versed in the wider dubbing scene, so I fear I don't have much useful input to offer on that front

[]: Re: English Voice actors for Extra Eva characters...             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Mon Feb 12, 2024 1:54 am I kinda have to wonder if they'd get some random VAs for these games, as that has happened many times with other franchises before. Yet at the same time, if something as relatively inconsequential as GoS 1 got enough fan interest to be localized in the West, they might have bothered getting the ADV VAs at the time. It's hardly impossible for a modern re-release to do that, or for any prospective new Eva games to do that, either. More mainstream franchises in the West like Dragonball or Naruto have had that happened. And in this case, though they are not strictly linked with ADV anymore, we'd probably see the majority of the ADV cast again as we did with Amazon's dub of NTE. Grant did show up in the pretty unexpected ANIMA audiobook.

[]: Re: English Voice actors for Extra Eva characters...             Quote Post by Asunji_Yuko » Mon Dec 30, 2024 9:45 pm OneShotPunch wrote: Let's say Girlfriend of Steel and/or Second Impression somehow made their way to America, even getting their own english dubs. Most likely it'd be ADV who would handle them, but let's assume Netflix's cast could also get on it. Who do you think would voice Mana Kirishima, Keita, Musashi and Mayumi Yamagishi? Add any other characters you'd like to see dubbed.

[]: Re: English Voice actors for Extra Eva characters...             Quote Post by DTGee » Wed Jan 01, 2025 6:43 pm Blockio wrote: khara also demonstrably has grown tired of their nonsense

[]: Re: English Voice actors for Extra Eva characters...             Quote Post by C. Smith » Sat Jan 25, 2025 3:26 am Are we talking about back in the day or now?

[]: Re: English Voice actors for Extra Eva characters...             Quote Post by OneShotPunch » Sat Feb 01, 2025 12:42 pm C. Smith wrote: Are we talking about back in the day or now?
